posts.author: Jaco (Jaco Breet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since the new menu structure the possibilities of customizing navigating are limited.
Would like to see the ability to change width and length of the navigation area (so that I would be able to see the full title of workspaces and board and to see more boards than 5)
